summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PROCTO 13 brand management system. Backend APIs working at 93% success rate, frontend fully functional with Russian interface and dark Amazon-style theme. All core features operational including admin dashboard, user management, Excel import, brand operations, and searcher workflows.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_bugs.impact: Very minor - authentication still works correctly

Navigation between all admin pages (Dashboard, Users, Import, Brands)
